subject: fix(content): clean up review issues — dead code, stale refs, perf
body:
Fixes 9 issues found during code review:

1. Remove dead `normalizedImageCells` alias — use `imageCells` directly
2. Remove unused `themeColorOptions` export from ColorPicker
3. Remove unused `textAlignOptions` export from AlignmentPicker
4. Fix useMemo dep in MiniCellGrid — depend on `type` + `structure`
   instead of `normalizedStructure` (new object ref every render for
   fullbleed layouts)
5. Deduplicate getCellPositionLabel — single loop with axis mapping
   instead of near-identical rows/columns branches
6. Fix handleFocus stale event target — capture `e.target` as `el`
   before setTimeout closure (fragile pattern even in React 18)
7. Hoist `markdownGroups` constant out of MarkdownToolbar render
8. Pre-group cellMap by section in useMemo (Map instead of flat array
   with per-section .filter()) — O(1) lookup instead of O(n) per section
9. Rename cell label "Auto" → "Default" for consistency with alignment
   picker rename

Tags: cleanup, perf, code-quality
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: content-tab-ux
Semver: patch
